pr.title: feat: Complete BookForge app — e-book hub with audiobook TTS, integrations, and auto theme
pr.body:
## Summary

Complete implementation of **BookForge** — a modern web-based e-book management platform that replaces/improves upon Calibre with a clean, responsive UI accessible from any browser.

### Features
- **EPUB Management** — Upload, parse metadata + cover art, search, filter, sort, grid/list views
- **In-Browser Reader** — Chapter-based reading with font size control and progress tracking
- **Audiobook Generator** — Text-to-speech via Web Speech API with configurable voices and speed
- **4 Integration Syncs** — Readwise (highlights), Notion (database), GitHub (markdown notes), Obsidian (vault/REST API)
- **Auto Day/Night Theme** — Automatically switches between light (6am–7pm) and dark (7pm–6am) themes based on time of day, with manual toggle override
- **EPUB Conversion** — Convert EPUB to TXT or HTML formats
- **Drag & Drop Upload** — Drop files anywhere to upload (EPUB, PDF, MOBI, TXT, HTML)
- **Tag Organization** — Custom tags with filter pills

### Tech Stack
- Node.js + Express backend with SQLite (better-sqlite3)
- Vanilla JavaScript SPA frontend
- epub2 for EPUB parsing and metadata extraction
- CSS variables with dual-theme support, gradients, glassmorphism, animations

### UI/Aesthetics
- Dark theme: Deep navy (#0c0e16) with purple accent gradient
- Light theme: Warm white (#f5f3ef) with deep purple accents
- Smooth transitions (0.25s cubic-bezier), hover effects, glow shadows
- Responsive sidebar that collapses on mobile

![Library Grid View - Light Theme](https://app.devin.ai/api/presigned_proxy?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..vKUn61iX-cdNzl0GlNKasi9-z6pBMzrIhlbPqN9Fyls)
![Library Grid View - Dark Theme](https://app.devin.ai/api/presigned_proxy?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..Yyot7Zd13zZHC1AtLRz7zzTBMv-Y8BlYhE4A20hni80)
![Book Detail Modal](https://app.devin.ai/api/presigned_proxy?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..YY220AeB5ASLyjq3XBvYCwTxfvPCfKY-9u9Ql6jzXsQ)
![Reader View - Dark Theme](https://app.devin.ai/api/presigned_proxy?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..oCGnqIFXBwuX4kCkzwc94EyL46SWN_3p_otIdEOacRg)
![Integrations Page](https://app.devin.ai/api/presigned_proxy?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..iKNveuoUMz1yf9V-mmfgOohalQEh74iNah3cyX3AECU)

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human
- [ ] Run `npm install && npm start` and verify the server starts on port 3000
- [ ] Upload an EPUB file and verify metadata + cover art are extracted
- [ ] Open the reader and navigate between chapters
- [ ] Toggle between light and dark themes
- [ ] Configure at least one integration (e.g. set `READWISE_ACCESS_TOKEN` in `.env`) and test sync

### Test Plan
1. Clone the repo, run `npm install && npm start`
2. Open `http://localhost:3000` in your browser
3. Upload an EPUB file via drag-and-drop or the Upload button
4. Click a book to see its detail modal, then click \"Read\" to open the reader
5. Test chapter navigation, font size controls, and theme toggle
6. Navigate to Integrations to see the 4 platform cards and setup guides
7. Copy `.env.example` to `.env`, add API tokens for any integrations you want to test

### Notes
- All integrations are optional — the app works fully without any configured
- TTS uses the browser's Web Speech API (no external service needed)
- The auto theme checks every 5 minutes if no manual override is saved
- Video tutorial demonstrating all features was recorded and shared separately

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/2373b4bc39a943f6a0f0905f24b3c498
Requested by: @aalikes
